task_description: Estimate the market size (TAM/SAM/SOM) for plant-based pet food in the United States.

input_data.context: A consumer packaged goods company is launching a premium plant-based dog food line. The product uses novel plant proteins to provide complete nutrition for dogs, positioned as healthier and more sustainable than traditional meat-based food. Pricing is $65 for a 20lb bag, approximately 2x premium over conventional dog food. Initial distribution through DTC e-commerce and specialty pet retailers. The company targets health-conscious millennial and Gen Z dog owners.
